summary: FieldFlow Pro v3.0 comprehensive testing completed. All 34 backend tests passed. Frontend UI tested for all 4 roles (Admin, Worker, CRE, Branch). Key v3.0 features verified: campaign-based coupon system, worker ledger tracking, expense management, CRE call logging with mandatory remarks, branch encashment with duplicate prevention, and data isolation (CRE sees full phone, Branch sees masked).

minor.issue: Added new endpoint to assign branch_id to branch users - was missing in original implementation

critical_code_review_comments: Branch user assignment: Added PATCH /api/users/{user_id}/branch endpoint to allow admin to assign branch_id to branch role users. This was needed for the branch encashment flow to work.
seed_data_creation: Created test campaigns with prefixes V3T*, ENC* for testing. Created test branch 'Test Branch' and assigned to branch user.
context_for_next_testing_agent: v3.0 features fully tested. All CRUD operations for campaigns, coupons, expenses, CRE calls, and branch encashments working. Data isolation verified (CRE sees full phone, Branch sees masked). Financial calculations (net_payable = revenue - advances - expenses) verified. GPS accuracy validation (>100m rejected) working. Duplicate sale and encashment prevention working.

features_tested.authentication: All 4 roles (Admin, Worker, CRE, Branch) login working
features_tested.campaign_management: Campaign creation with auto-generated serial coupon codes (prefix + 001-010) working
features_tested.coupon_validation: Valid codes return campaign name/price, invalid codes rejected
features_tested.worker_sale: Complete sale flow with branch selection, GPS validation, customer details working
features_tested.worker_ledger: Auto-updates after sale (total_revenue, total_coupons_sold, net_payable) working
features_tested.expense_module: Small expenses (<100) without photo allowed, large expenses (>100) require photo
features_tested.cre_call_logging: Log call, add mandatory remarks, view call history working
features_tested.cre_data_access: CRE sees FULL phone numbers (not masked)
features_tested.branch_data_access: Branch sees MASKED phone numbers (last 4 only)
features_tested.admin_views: CRE remarks, encashments, all ledgers, add advance working

mocked_apis.OTP_verification: POST /api/coupons/request-otp returns mock_otp in response for testing
